title: Namib Desert Star Dunes at Twilight
prompt: A sweeping photorealistic landscape of the Namib Desert's towering star dunes at twilight, their sinuous ridgelines casting deep violet and amber shadows as the last light fades. The sky transitions from deep indigo overhead to a warm burnt-orange horizon, with the first stars of the night emerging through the haze. A lone oryx silhouette stands atop a dune crest, adding a sense of solitary grandeur to the vast, silent desert.

title: Beach Run Arms Out Low Angle Laughing
prompt: A young solo female model with blonde hair and Korean appearance is captured mid-run along a sun-drenched beach, her arms stretched wide open to either side as if embracing the ocean breeze. Shot from a dramatic low angle looking up, the camera tilts slightly to capture her laughing freely with eyes bright, while golden-hour light silhouettes her figure against a warm pastel sky. Wet sand and gentle surf wash around her bare feet, creating dynamic water splashes frozen in time. Lifestyle candid style with a warm filmic color grade, 35mm lens perspective, shallow depth of field blurring the distant horizon.
